headline: Earnings Preview: QuidelOrtho (QDEL) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: QuidelOrtho (QDEL) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
